creator: jmcoopr@webmail.bmi.net
text:
For some reason, my last follow up arrived coded in base64.  Sorry about
that!  I should read:

I attempted to contact the maintainer by e-mail with the above patch in
early March.  To date, I have received no response.

Bummer . . .

I would like my patch considered for updating this port.  I am also
interested in porting jgnat-1.1p to FreeBSD (probably requires the
linux-jdk since a 1.2 or better java is recommended).

jmc
